title: 💼 Hiring: Altcoins Trading Researcher - Crypto Trading Firm

description_full:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 Posted 5 hours ago - May 16, 2026 | 💰 $150-300k Base + Commission DOE | 🧑‍💻 Senior

The company is a high-performing proprietary trading firm specialising in digital assets. They deploy quantitative and algorithmic strategies supported by rigorous data-driven research and disciplined risk management.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Conduct deep-dive research into altcoin ecosystems, protocols, and emerging sectors.
- Analyse token supply dynamics, incentive structures, governance models, and adoption trends.
- Track narratives, catalysts, and upcoming launches across crypto markets.
- Translate research into actionable ideas for traders and systematic strategies.
- Develop structured frameworks for assessing project quality, valuation, and competitive positioning.
- Engage with founders, investors, and ecosystem participants to stay ahead of market shifts.

🔑 Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience in crypto research, venture investing, or digital asset analysis.
- Proven ability to produce research that influences capital allocation or positioning.
- Strong understanding of tokenomics, L1/L2 ecosystems, and DeFi infrastructure.
- Ability to bridge qualitative insight with quantitative evidence.
- Well-networked within the crypto ecosystem.
- Clear communicator with conviction and intellectual curiosity.

📩 To apply: Review the full role and apply here: https://blockchainheadhunter.com/jobs/Altcoin-Trading-Researcher or reach out directly to Michael Shlayen on LinkedIn. A brief cover letter highlighting your most relevant experience & accomplishments is very welcome.

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/blockchainheadhunter-share-7460942691292536832-C7TG
